The partnership will simplify access to banking services for businesses establishing or operating within the free zone, further strengthening the ecosystem supporting entrepreneurs, start-ups, and established companies.

Donald Trump’s sudden decision to announce a blockade of the Strait of Hormuz continues a costly and failed path that began on the battlefield, reached a dead end at the negotiating table, and has now arrived at a stage between war and peace – neither a ceasefire nor all-out war, but “controlled pressure” with uncontrolled risks. America’s efforts to change the equation against Iran failed one after another: direct military pressure achieved nothing; the diplomatic path and Islamabad Talks led to no tangible result. Now, Washington assumes that a naval blockade could be the third option. While the Strait of Hormuz is a vital energy chokepoint, a naval blockade of the strait can backfire agai
